name: Cappuccino Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Dissolve instant coffee with cinnamon in hot water and set aside to cool.
3. Mix nuts, sugar, and melted butter; press onto bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes, remove, and let cool.
4. Increase oven temperature to 450°F (230°C). Beat cream cheese, sugar, and flour until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Blend in sour cream. Gradually add cooled coffee mixture to the cream cheese mixture; mix well until combined.
6. Pour filling over crust and bake for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F (120°C) and continue baking for 1 hour.
7. Turn off oven and let cake cool inside for 1 hour. Remove from oven and allow it to cool completely before refrigerating for at least 3 hours.
Garnish with chocolate whipped cream (while whipping cream, add 3 tablespoons powdered sugar, 1/4 cup cocoa, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla) and chocolate-covered espresso beans.
